summary: Bug fix VERIFIED: MAQUINA3 correctly shows 0 orders, 0 remaining pieces, and 'idle' status. Historical production_logs (12 for M3) no longer affect machine order counts in capacity-plan. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: CapacityPlanModal and ProductionScreen both correctly display MAQUINA3 as 'Sin actividad' with 0 pending pieces.

feature_tested.name: MAQUINA3 Capacity Plan Bug Fix
feature_tested.description: MAQUINA3 showed 3 orders when there were 0 physical orders in that board. Root cause: production_logs from old/moved orders were being counted. Fix: capacity-plan now ONLY uses orders physically present in each machine board (orders.board == MAQUINA*)

endpoints.GET /api/capacity-plan: Returns machine stats based on physical orders only, not historical production_logs
endpoints.GET /api/gantt-data: Still shows historical production_logs for Gantt visualization

features_verified: GET /api/capacity-plan: MAQUINA2-14 all idle with 0 orders
GET /api/gantt-data: Historical production_logs still visible (43 logs)
Frontend CapacityPlanModal: MAQUINA3 shows 'Sin actividad' with 0 pz
Frontend ProductionScreen: MAQUINA3 shows 'SIN ACTIVIDAD' with 0 pending
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session for capacity plan API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: MAQUINA3 bug fixed and verified. Backend capacity-plan endpoint now uses orders_by_machine dict built from orders.board field to determine which orders are physically in each machine. Historical production_logs are only used for avg_daily_production stats of orders currently in machines. Gantt endpoint still shows all historical data. DB state: MAQUINA1 has order 2014 (qty=6000), all other machines empty. COMPLETOS has 5288 qty total.
